name: Souper Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of celery soup (10.75 oz)
2 medium zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken parts and pat dry.
2. Mix the celery soup with flour.
3. Combine all ingredients in a Crock-Pot; stir thoroughly to coat the chicken.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
Serves 4
